nasb.text: The border extended from there and turned round on the west side southward, from the hill which lies before Beth-horon southward; and it ended at Kiriath-baal (that is, Kiriath-jearim), a city of the sons of Judah. This was the west side.

esv.text: Then the boundary goes in another direction, turning on the western side southward from the mountain that lies to the south, opposite Beth-horon, and it ends at Kiriath-baal (that is, Kiriath-jearim), a city belonging to the people of Judah. This forms the western side.

cnv.text: 又從那裡伸延，繞到西邊再向南，從伯．和崙南邊對面的山起，直到猶大人的城基列．巴力，基列．巴力就是基列．耶琳；這是西方的疆界。

ccb.text: 西面的边界自伯·和仑对面山的西侧向南直到犹大人的基列·巴力，即基列·耶琳。
